images.copyright: Polar bear mother and cubs playing in Wapusk National Park, Manitoba, Canada (© Hao Jiang/Getty Images)
images.title: A bond that endures
images.caption: Happy Mother's Day!
images.desc: On Mother's Day, we honor the care, patience, and protection that shape lives everywhere. In the wild, these qualities often stand out most where survival is hardest. Captured in Wapusk National Park in northern Manitoba, Canada, today's image shows a polar bear mother and her cubs sharing a playful moment on the Arctic tundra.

tooltips.walle: This image is not available to download as wallpaper.
